disclaimer: Illustrative list, curated as of 2026-07-10. Recruiting status changes frequently — verify on each study's official site before acting.

studies.name: All of Us Research Program
studies.focus: Building a diverse US health database; actively prioritizes historically underrepresented communities.

studies.name: H3Africa
studies.consortium: Human Heredity and Health in Africa
studies.focus: Genomics research led by African scientists across the continent.

studies.name: GenomeAsia 100K
studies.focus: Sequencing to close the Asian representation gap in reference panels.

studies.name: PAGE Study
studies.consortium: Population Architecture using Genomics and Epidemiology
studies.focus: Genetic studies in ancestrally diverse populations.
